from fastapi import FastAPI

app = FastAPI()


@app.get("/dashboard")
async def get_dashboard():
    return {
        "user": {"name": "Alice", "role": "admin", "avatar": "/img/alice.png"},
        "stats": {
            "total_orders": 1234,
            "pending_orders": 56,
            "total_revenue": 98765.43,
            "average_order_value": 80.05,
            "top_product": "Widget Pro",
            "conversion_rate": 0.032,
        },
        "notifications": [
            {"id": 1, "type": "info", "message": "New feature available"},
            {"id": 2, "type": "warning", "message": "Low stock alert"},
            {"id": 3, "type": "success", "message": "Order shipped"},
        ],
        "settings": {
            "theme": "dark",
            "language": "en",
            "timezone": "UTC",
            "currency": "USD",
        },
    }
